overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing a character walking along a city street at dusk. The scene features neon-lit buildings, industrial architecture, light vehicle traffic, and atmospheric haze against an orange-purple sky.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light at the intersection, then beginning to walk as the signal changes

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching in the distance

entered.detail: large industrial traffic light structure with horizontal bar and red lights
tall buildings with colorful neon signage and advertisements
multi-story industrial building with metal railings and balconies
overhead electrical wires and cables crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Standing at a cyberpunk city intersection at dusk, waiting for the traffic light to change. The scene features a prominent traffic light structure, neon-lit buildings on the left, and an industrial building on the right. A car approaches in the distance as the light turns green.

events.description: passing the traffic light pole and moving deeper into the street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the traffic light structure

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible further down the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking past the traffic light structure along the concrete sidewalk. A dark sedan passes by on the left. The palm tree becomes more prominent on the right as the industrial building facade continues alongside. The neon buildings remain visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial buildings and neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the left, approaching a distant pedestrian

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing the walk along the city sidewalk with the industrial building on the right and palm tree now closer. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left. The neon-lit buildings remain visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with passing pedestrian and neon signage

events.description: passing a pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking past a pedestrian with red hair while continuing down the street alongside the industrial building

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright pink and blue neon sign on the right industrial building

segments.scene_description: Walking past a pedestrian with red hair moving in the opposite direction. A bright pink neon sign is now visible on the right industrial building. The palm tree stands prominently on the right as vehicles continue to pass on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a static city intersection into a vibrant, neon-lit industrial corridor at dusk. It begins stationary at a crossing, facing a traffic light structure with neon buildings to the left and an industrial facade to the right, until the light turns green and a distant car approaches. As the camera moves forward onto the concrete sidewalk, a dark sedan passes by on the left while a palm tree emerges more prominently against the industrial backdrop. The walk continues along the multi-lane road with vehicles streaming past, shifting the perspective further down the street as the distant neon glow persists. Finally, the scene passes a red-haired pedestrian moving in the opposite direction before revealing a bright pink neon sign affixed to the industrial building on the right.
